case_title: WRIGHT, JOHN DBA EPOXY SYSTEMS VS SHC CONSTRACTORS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, JOHN DBA EPOXY SYSTEMS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHC CONSTRACTORS DEFENDANT FILED VENUE CHALLENGE AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO OPPOSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
